title: Bath Filter for Bathtub, Tub Water Filter with Overflow, 8000 Gallon Faucet Filter | Removes Chlorine, Fluoride & Contaminants | Hard Water Softener | Protects

categories_flat: Home & Kitchen > Cooking & Dining > Water Coolers, Filters & Cartridges > Filter Taps
description: Introducing our bath filter, the ultimate solution to enhance your bath experience. This bath filter for bathtub is designed to effectively reduce impurities and metals in tap water, providing healthier water for your skin and hair. Our latest filter features 16 filter materials, providing a multi-layered approach to filtering harmful pollutants from the water. This bathtub filter for bathtub faucet contains a powerful combination of KDF 55, activated carbon, calcium sulphite, zeolite and tourmaline. Backed by clinical research and literature, it effectively removes 99% of chlorine, heavy metals, rust, scale, alkali and other harmful substances, while absorbing odors. Experience clean water and protection from harmful impurities, making it a great choice for any home. Whether you use it in your sink or bathtub, this sink faucet water filter ensures cleaner and fresher water. Before entering the bathtub, be aware that a bath water filter for your bathtub faucet works effectively. The bathtub water filter can have a significant impact on the overall quality of your bathtub. The bath filter easily connects to any standard faucet, and its durable ABS material ensures long-lasting resistance to heat and wear. The carefully designed handle makes it easy to use and adjust the water flow. For those looking for protection while bathing, this softer tub filter is an almost perfect choice. It filters out heavy metals and other contaminants that can have a negative impact on your health. By filtering these elements, the water is softer and smoother, improving the natural glow of your skin and hair. This tap water filter helps keep your family safe and provides peace of mind. Our bath tap water filter features a suspended design, allowing for a larger filtration area compared to traditional options. With this, the water splashing on you will be cleaner than before. This faucet filter lasts 10-12 months and can filter 20,000 liters of water, so there is no need to worry about replacing it quickly. The life of the shower filter far exceeds many alternatives, providing great value for your life. Whatever the stage of your life, buying this bathtub filter makes sense. The bathtub filter for bathtub faucet is also a great gift for friends and family. Improve the way you bathe, feel refreshed and take a step towards better health. Make the right choice today and enjoy clean, filtered water that benefits you and your loved ones.
feature_bullets: SKIN & HAIR CARE - This bath filter for bathtub, enriched with vitamin C spheres, mineralizing spheres and magnetic energy spheres, infuses water with oxygen, essential minerals and antioxidants. This combination nourishes the skin and hair, treating common problems such as dryness, itching, dandruff and eczema. Vitamin C neutralizes free radicals, while minerals like calcium and magnesium strengthen nails, improve skin and hair function, and provide spa-like rejuvenation.

[Cost Effective & Durable] Compared with similar products, this upgraded bathtub filter features a 10,000 gallon lifespan and continuous use of 10-12 months, providing great value for money. Its longevity reduces long-term costs while maintaining constant protection against impurities. By filtering harmful substances for thousands of uses, the bathtub water filter ensures clean and economical bath water, making it an ideal choice for budget families looking for high-quality water treatment.

MULTI-LAYER FILTRATION The bathtub filter for bathtub faucet uses a scientifically proven blend of KDF 55, activated carbon, calcium sulphite, zeolite and tourmaline. It removes 99% of chlorine, heavy metals and odours. Calcium sulfite reduces scale build-up, while zeolite and tourmaline improve mineralization and ionization. This multi-layer approach ensures complete purification and softens hard water, turning tap water into a safe, odorless bathing environment.

HIGH TEMPERATURE RESISTANT ABS CONSTRUCTION This bath water filter is made of ABS material, which can withstand high temperature and physical stress without deforming or falling off. This durability ensures reliable performance in a variety of conditions, from hot baths to high impact resistance. The sturdy design ensures longevity, making the faucet filter a reliable investment for everyday use in busy households.

UNIVERSAL INSTALLATION Designed to fit most tap water filters, this shower filter is universally adaptable, making it suitable for adults and children. Its quick installation mechanism requires no specialized tools, making it suitable for families, travelers and wellness enthusiasts. Whether at home or on the go, users can effortlessly enjoy softened and oxygenated water, turning any bath space into a rejuvenating oasis.

top_reviews.title: Wonderful water softener!
top_reviews.body: This filter is well worth the money.  It makes the water feel as soft as lake water and leaves your skin and hair feeling gently refreshed.  You can even transfer soft water in a pitcher to the sink to wash your face.  At the price I paid, refills cost more than the original, so I purchased 2 more instead.  Great product for a very reasonable price.

date.raw: Reviewed in the United States on 1 April 2026
Reviewed in the United States on 3 February 2026

top_reviews.title: Please read !
top_reviews.body: The product itself is great ! I have hard water and  water feels slimy. I use this for my baby’s bath and the water comes out purified . The only bad thing I have to say is that I was sent a used item ! I needed the item, so I didn’t return for a new one ! As soon as I took it out of the box you can see someone had used it. There was water inside the filter and bag it came in. I was disappointed about that.

date.raw: Reviewed in the United States on 18 March 2026
Reviewed in the United States on 9 April 2026

top_reviews.title: Cleared up baby acne
top_reviews.body: We have hard water so thsi filter instantly cleared up mine and my baby’s acne!

date.raw: Reviewed in the United States on 31 March 2026
